ques: Find The SpeciaList section in Travel and browse the page to see which cities are mentioned.
answer: On BBC Travel's "The SpeciaList" page, the cities mentioned across the articles include: Paris (perfume shopping & the underground river Bièvre), Dublin (best Guinness pubs), Hong Kong (a weekend guide), New Orleans (live music venues), Berlin (hidden Nazi bunkers), Cortina d'Ampezzo, Italy (ski break), Whistler, Canada (freeskiing), and New York City (a Rockette's Christmas & a stylist's shopping guide). The page also references the Japanese village of Magome and countries/regions such as Spain, the Netherlands, Scotland, Finland, Kazakhstan and the Greek island of Ikaria.
